steps.step: Install nhooyr.io/websocket and related dependencies in cli/cjtCli
Implement secure handshake logic (Nonce fetch + Sign calculation)
Implement Dialer in internal/daemon/stream/dialer.go with exponential backoff
Implement message dispatcher for EventFrame and Ticket updates
Write unit tests for handshake signature calculation
Write unit tests for backoff logic
Test connection stability with Mock WebSocket server
